template_name: Standard Prescription Format – Safe Infant Transport and Car Seat Counseling
diagnosis_name: Safe Infant Transport and Car Seat Counseling
condition: Safe Infant Transport and Car Seat Use

diagnosis.primary: Parental Counseling for Safe Infant Transport

principles: All infants must travel in a rear-facing car seat
Correct installation and positioning are essential
Use car seat only for transport, not routine sleep
Regular assessment and reinforcement at OPD visits

advice.recommendation: Rear-facing car seat in back seat, preferably center position
Straps at or below shoulder level, snug fit
Use only during travel; not for sleeping at home

special_situations.condition: Preterm or low birth weight infant
special_situations.recommendation: Monitor tolerance in car seat (risk of desaturation)
Perform car seat challenge test before discharge

common_errors: Loose harness or incorrect chest clip position
Use of non-approved padding or accessories
contraindications_or_warnings: Use of second-hand seat with unknown history
Using car seat for sleep outside vehicle
red_flags: Use of expired or unsafe seat
management_plan: Assess car seat usage at every OPD visit
Advise on appropriate car seat selection
parent_counseling: Always use a car seat, even for short trips — छोटी यात्रा में भी कार सीट ज़रूर लगाएं
Rear-facing is safest until at least 2 years or weight/height limit — पीछे की ओर मुंह करके बैठाना 2 साल तक सबसे सुरक्षित है
Ensure snug harness and proper clip position — बेल्ट कसी हो और क्लिप सही जगह हो
Never leave baby unattended in car seat outside vehicle — गाड़ी के बाहर कार सीट में बच्चे को अकेला न छोड़ें
Avoid aftermarket accessories unless approved — बिना मान्यता वाले एक्सेसरीज़ का इस्तेमाल न करें
Check expiry date of car seat — कार सीट की एक्सपायरी डेट जांचें
opd_checklist: Harness fit and chest clip position correct?
warning_signs: Infant shows color change or breathing difficulty in car seat — कार सीट में बच्चे का रंग बदलना या सांस लेने में तकलीफ़
Head slumping forward or chin on chest — सिर आगे गिरना या ठोड़ी छाती पर
Apnea or desaturation episodes — सांस रुकना या ऑक्सीजन कम होना
Sweating or excessive irritability — ज़्यादा पसीना या चिड़चिड़ापन
expected_course: Counseling is provided at discharge and reinforced at every OPD visit. Most families adapt well with demonstration. Preterm and low-birth-weight infants require a car seat challenge test before discharge to ensure safe tolerance of the semi-upright position.
key_clinical_points: Indian context: car seat use is low but injury prevention counseling is essential
Preterm infants (<37 weeks) and LBW (<2.5 kg) need car seat challenge test
Car seat should NOT be used as a routine sleep device at home
Rear-facing position is mandatory until at least 2 years of age
Avoid bulky clothing under harness straps
